articles.title: Zipline’s autonomous drone charging stations – now at scale The company shows impressive delivery capabilities across multiple missions. Sin
articles.snippet: Zipline’s autonomous drone charging stations – now at scale The company shows impressive delivery capabilities across multiple missions. Since 2014, starting with medical supply drops in Rwanda, and today, precise urban deliveries with autonomous landing and charging, no human operator needed. Zipline operates in the US, Ghana, Japan and more. Autonomous drones are about to enter hashtag #civilian_airspace, just as they already have in the military domain ✈️ High-level autonomy and supportive regulation are not a question of if, but when. And the answer is: soon

articles.title: 🚀 This week, we had the opportunity to test Nokia's fully autonomous drone system, designed and manufactured entirely in-house! 🚁 The dron
articles.snippet: 🚀 This week, we had the opportunity to test Nokia's fully autonomous drone system, designed and manufactured entirely in-house! 🚁 The drone operates from automated docking stations that are climate-controlled, automatically position the drone upon landing, and recharge it for the next mission. With a payload capacity of up to 3 kg, the drone is versatile for various applications. 📸 Equipped with high-resolution visible spectrum and infrared cameras, the drone can also be fitted with alternative payloads such as network measurement devices or scanners. The modular design allows for custom adapters, enabling the integration of diverse equipment as per mission requirements. 🪂 Safety is paramount with features like an emergency parachute system and dual integrated modems. These modems ensure continuous connectivity to both private and public networks, maintaining a constant link to the control center. 🌍 Real-world deployments underscore the system's efficacy: 👉 In Belgium, hashtag #C

articles.snippet: Hon’ble Union Minister Shri Jitin Prasada (Minister of State for Electronics & IT, and Commerce & Industry) visited the Drone Center at IIT Bombay on 20/09/2025 and reviewed the technological developments. In this photo, he is reviewing my contribution – an Autonomous Drone Docking Station with Battery Swapping Capabilities. hashtag #DroneTechnology hashtag #IITBombay hashtag #MakeInIndia

articles.title: Excited to share that AECA Solutions is now an authorized reseller of the full suite of hashtag #DJI Enterprise hashtag #drone solutions in
articles.snippet: Excited to share that AECA Solutions is now an authorized reseller of the full suite of hashtag #DJI Enterprise hashtag #drone solutions in Malaysia — including the revolutionary hashtag #DJIDock3, a fully autonomous drone docking station. This development marks an exciting new chapter in our drone portfolio. After several successful years as the authorized distributor of hashtag #QuantumSystems’ eVTOL hashtag #fixedwingdrones — now the market leader in Malaysia — the DJI partnership allows us to further expand our offerings. With both Quantum Systems and DJI Enterprise, we now represent two of the most powerful brands in the drone industry that will help us serve a wide range of verticals and deliver unmatched value across industries. With this expanded lineup, we’re ready to help even more organizations digitally transform their operations.

articles.title: When you think about autonomous inspections, do you think about the hardware, the software, or the team that makes it all work? At Percepto,
articles.snippet: When you think about autonomous inspections, do you think about the hardware, the software, or the team that makes it all work? At Percepto, our offering is built on a foundation of all 3️⃣: 🤖 our HARDWARE (the autonomous drones and base stations) 💻 our SOFTWARE (this is the brain and heart of the operation) is where our AI algorithms go to work 🧑‍✈️ our dedicated SERVICES team (providing the expertise to deploy & scale safely and efficiently) It's a complete ecosystem designed to deliver results, not just sell a product. No third party. We handle it end-to-end. hashtag #hardware hashtag #software hashtag #services

articles.title: 🚀 Russia Unveils First Autonomous Orbital Drone Station 🎛️ Russia has just patented a groundbreaking space innovation: an orbital station
articles.snippet: 🚀 Russia Unveils First Autonomous Orbital Drone Station 🎛️ Russia has just patented a groundbreaking space innovation: an orbital station capable of automatically launching spacecraft and using robotic drones for self-maintenance, a global first. 🛰️🤖 The system is scheduled for testing on the upcoming Russian Orbital Station (ROS) and is being considered for the country’s lunar missions . This tech leap could redefine space operations, enabling robot-led repairs and resupply without needing human crews onboard. Testing is expected to begin around 2027, with full deployment aimed for completion by 2030–2033. What a spectacular stride in autonomous orbital engineering, a true game‑changer for efficient, low‑risk space missions! 🌌✨

articles.title: Innovation in drone security is moving crazy fast! I’m almost sad to see the new Mavic 4’s AI features already outclass the M30T—an incredib
articles.snippet: Innovation in drone security is moving crazy fast! I’m almost sad to see the new Mavic 4’s AI features already outclass the M30T—an incredible platform still holding its own. This pace of change raises a critical question for security operations: Why buy, when innovation is so quickly outpacing ownership? Shouldn't the industry be advocating for subscription-based autonomus drone services—a model that keeps clients at the forefront of tech without the sunken costs of frequent hardware upgrades?. ✅ Access the latest drone and AI features ✅ Avoid capital expenses every time there is an upgrade ✅ Full life-cycle support, from deployment to replacement ✅ Leave us with the “second-hand drone Christmas presents” 🎁😉 As autonomous drone stations and AI-enabled patrols become standard, smart service delivery is the future. We're building a model where innovation is on tap—not on your balance sheet. hashtag #DroneSecurity hashtag #SecurityInnovation hashtag #SmartSecurity hashtag #SecuritySolu

articles.title: Last night, Vilnius turned into a real-life safari. We joined the search for the now-famous city bear - a reminder of how essential real-tim
articles.snippet: Last night, Vilnius turned into a real-life safari. We joined the search for the now-famous city bear - a reminder of how essential real-time visibility and fast response are in unexpected situations. 🐾 If Vilnius - or all of Lithuania - were covered by DBOX autonomous drone stations, this bear (or even a rabbit!) would’ve been spotted instantly. 📡 ✅ We have a solution for emergency response. ✅ Real-time reaction, right when it matters. ✅ The more drone bases - the faster and broader the coverage. Tonight, the search continues. SAM Ekstremalių sveikatai situacijų centras, Lietuvos policija, ID Vilnius, Vidaus reikalų ministerija / Ministry of the Interior, Vladislav Kondratovič, Valdas Benkunskas, Robert Duchnevič, Vilniaus rajono savivaldybė/Samorząd Rejonu Wileńskiego But first - here’s a glimpse of the wildlife we captured yesterday.👇 hashtag #DBOX hashtag #DroneInABox hashtag #AutonomousDrones hashtag #InnovationInLithuania hashtag #UrbanMonitoring hashtag #WildlifeSurveillance

articles.title: Late post: I'm happy to share a look at a project delivered at the end of last year in Sumedang City. While the implementation was completed
articles.snippet: Late post: I'm happy to share a look at a project delivered at the end of last year in Sumedang City. While the implementation was completed in late 2025, the municipality officially announced it to the public earlier this month (see: https://lnkd.in/gKWcN6SH). Working as the technology partner alongside PT Alita as project owner, we aimed to consolidate smart city services into a single "Smart Pole". This is much more than a utility pole, it has: - Connectivity & Media: Micro-cell BTS, Free WiFi, LED Panel/Videotron and Public Announcer/Speaker. - Intelligence: AI-powered CCTV and an autonomous surveillance drone docking station. - Sustainability: Smart PJU lighting and EV Charging station. - Real-time Sensor Data: Environmental sensors (Air quality, temp, humidity). I think it was the first in Indonesia and will continue to evolve. I’m curious is there any similar implementations? hashtag #SmartCity hashtag #SmartPole hashtag #IoT hashtag #TechInnovation

articles.title: Field autonomy, anywhere you can drive. In this YouTube Short, we demonstrate a first-time setup of the Dock for vehicle-mounted deployment,
articles.snippet: Field autonomy, anywhere you can drive. In this YouTube Short, we demonstrate a first-time setup of the Dock for vehicle-mounted deployment, transforming it into a mobile autonomous drone station capable of operating across multiple sites in a single day. This approach offers new levels of flexibility for field operations, emergency response, surveying, and asset inspection, where fast redeployment is essential. 🎥 Watch as the Dock 3 is set up, the drone autonomously lands, and the vehicle rolls out, ready for the next location: https://lnkd.in/ezjAyuuj hashtag #DJIDock3 hashtag #DJIEnterprise hashtag #DroneTechnology hashtag #AutonomousDrones hashtag #VehicleMountedDock hashtag #FieldOperations hashtag #DroneSolutions hashtag #PrismaTech BYD hashtag #byd

articles.title: Somewear Labs is heading to the Tough Stump Technologies Rodeo next week, and we’re looking forward to pushing the boundaries of tactical co
articles.snippet: Somewear Labs is heading to the Tough Stump Technologies Rodeo next week, and we’re looking forward to pushing the boundaries of tactical communication and demonstrating the power of our software-defined network. We're excited to showcase: -- MANET Resilience -- See how Somewear's BLOS narrowband backhaul seamlessly extends your tactical reach. When your MANET link breaks, Somewear’s SmartRouting™ logic takes over, providing critical BLOS connectivity for data to continue flowing across all linked MANETs and also back to command. We'll demonstrate this capability with radios from Silvus Technologies, TrellisWare Technologies, and Doodle Labs. -- Unmanned Operations -- Discover how our low SWaP-C (size, weight, power, and cost) Node provides LOS and BLOS control and enhanced situational awareness for UxS operations. Range is no longer a limitation for mission commands and data flow. -- Networking UAV Wireless Charging Stations -- We'll be highlighting our integration with Quaze Technolo

articles.title: 📦🚁 It’s Here! Unboxing the All-New DJI Dock 3 at AeroSmart 🎥🔧 We’re thrilled to announce that we’ve officially received the DJI Dock 3 —
articles.snippet: 📦🚁 It’s Here! Unboxing the All-New DJI Dock 3 at AeroSmart 🎥🔧 We’re thrilled to announce that we’ve officially received the DJI Dock 3 — DJI’s most advanced autonomous drone station yet — and we couldn’t wait to get hands-on with it! 🎬 In this unboxing video, get a first look at: 🔹 The compact yet rugged design built for tough environments 🔹 Key upgrades from Dock 2, including support for the Matrice 4D / 4TD 🔹 Enhanced weather resistance, faster charging, and more powerful mission deployment 🔹 Features that enable mobile deployment, dual dock support, and offline operation The DJI Dock 3 is the future of automated drone operations, and we’re excited to lead the way in deploying it across industries in the region. 📩 Want to explore how Dock 3 can fit into your security, inspection, or monitoring operations? Email us at sales@aerosmart.ae or visit 👉 www.aerosmart.ae hashtag #DJIDock3 hashtag #AutonomousDrones hashtag #DroneAutomation hashtag #AeroSmart hashtag #DJIEnterprise
